perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a patterned bucket hat and white top stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding two large bottles of a beverage and gesturing excitedly towards them. (2) She brings the bottles close to the lens, showing the labels and the layer of chia seeds inside. (3) The scene cuts to an indoor kitchen or dining area where the same woman and another woman in a black beret are seated at a marble table. (4) A close-up shot shows the beverage being poured into a glass filled with ice, clearly displaying the distribution of chia seeds. (5) The two women drink from their glasses, react with positive facial expressions, and continue to discuss the product while holding the bottles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music begins. A female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone, asking about a trending topic. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the speaker describes the product's price and ingredients in a fast-paced manner. (3) The sound of liquid pouring and ice clinking is briefly heard during a close-up shot. (4) The audio transitions to a conversational dialogue between two females, maintaining a friendly and enthusiastic tone as they critique the taste. (5) Cartoon-style sound effects (pops and dings) occur periodically, synchronized with on-screen text appearances.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' and 'Threads' logos are prominently displayed at the top. (2) Hook Text: '现在在脆Threads上爆红的是什么' (What's popular on Threads right now?) in a variety-show style font. (3) Functional Text: '话题超高 蜂蜜柠檬奇亚籽' (High topic: Honey Lemon Chia Seed) and '一个才80多元' (Only 80+ dollars each) highlight product value. (4) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the dialogue regarding flavor preferences, such as '会自己再多加更多的柠檬' (I would add more lemon myself).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store Intro -> Product Feature Breakdown -> Home Tasting Session -> Summary Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appear throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white ruffled top. The second woman wears a black beret and a dark off-the-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a retail warehouse with shelves of bulk goods; moves to a clean, modern home interior with a marble table and kitchen cabinets.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a product endorsement and review designed to drive sales of a specific beverage sold at Costco. It leverages the 'social proof' of a social media trend (Threads) to capture attention, provides factual evidence of product value (low price and high ingredient density), and offers a personal tasting review to build consumer trust and relatability.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of the product, price disclosure, and verbal recommendation for purchase.
endorsementObject: Natural Benefits 蜂蜜柠檬奇亚籽

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show text overlays combined with a split-location (store and home) vlogging style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video specifically mentions 'Threads' and '手摇杯' (hand-shaken drinks), targeting a young, digitally-active Taiwanese demographic that values both social media trends and cost-effective alternatives to popular street drinks.
